content.en:
"Endless Lord, I really envy you, I broke through the Immortal Dragon Rock Sea of Fire, and I was not injured, and you are only half a step beyond the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord, and our top Transcendence Realm Legendary Lords are actually seriously injured!"

Lord Jinbei said enviously.

"It's just luck, it's just that I'm just not afraid of the immortal dragon rock fire. Ye Tian smiled slightly.

"Let's go and see what's good here. "

Cloud Lord Dao.

So, Ye Tian and they were all separated, otherwise it would be difficult to distribute good things if they found them.

Whoa!!

Several people flew away in one direction after another.

Everyone flies very slowly, just for fear of encountering traps.

After all, this is the burial ground of Lord Yang Lie, so naturally you have to be careful, otherwise you won't know how you will die.

Lord Yang Lie's graveyard is huge, like a new world.

As the lord of the legendary realm, the lord of Yang Lie naturally does not want his graveyard to be disturbed after death, so he will arrange the immortal dragon rock fire at the entrance, but the lord of Yang Lie actually set up not to allow the lord of the legendary realm above half a step to enter the cemetery, and the internal setting cannot be too strong, and it is impossible to threaten 137 to the level of the lord of the legendary realm.

Moreover, the Yang Lie Lord must have expected that his graveyard would be discovered one day, so he was afraid that the periphery would give some benefits, but a very dangerous trap must have been set up inside, which could almost make the almost invincible existence of the Transcendental Realm Lord fall many times.

Therefore, Ye Tian also had to be careful.

Although he didn't care about a replica body, once it fell, it would take a lot of time.

Therefore, if you can not fall, do not fall

Soon.

Ye Tian found a temple, right in the void.

Subsequently, he entered it, but the temple was wrapped in a prohibition, and in order to enter it, he had to break the ban.

Rumble!

Ye Tian tried to attack, and found that the forbidden defense was good, at least it would take many top transcendent realm lords to make a move, and it would take some time to break it.

And he can break the ban alone, but it will be wasted for a long time.

As a result, Ye Tian directly gave up the things in this hall.

After all, the time river bead is such a precious item, it is impossible to put it in this place.

In the following time, Ye Tian found several palaces, all of which were forbidden.

He also saw some transcendent lords, healing while breaking the ban.

Ye Tian didn't care about the benefits here, but looked for a passage into the interior of the cemetery.

"Make a few copies of the body and look for it together. "

Ye Tian began to copy his body.

Soon, three replica bodies converged here.

Three replica bodies shuttle from different directions, searching for the inner passage of the cemetery.

Finally, after spending a lot of time, Ye Tian finally found it.

Moreover, not only Ye Tian found it, but also several Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords also found it.

......

An unimaginably large Void Gate appeared in the Void, and everyone knew that behind this Void Gate was the place that led to the interior of the cemetery.

And at this moment, Ye Tian came here, and there were three Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords who were hesitating to enter.

Ye Tian saw that they didn't dare to go in, so he went in first.

When the three of them saw that Ye Tian had entered, they no longer hesitated and went in together.

After passing through the Void Gate, there is a calm area on the other side.

At the right point, you can see the shadow of the palace, which is supposed to be the inner cemetery area.

"The treasure there is mine!"

A Transcendental Legendary Lord excitedly.

He shuttled quickly, but as soon as he shuttled a distance, the whole person instantly froze, and then his body was annihilated

"What's going on?"

The other two Transcendental Lords were stunned.

How could it be that all of a sudden, this transcendent lord was annihilated?

"Time Trap!"

Ye Tian can see it.

Just now, the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord fell into the time trap arranged by the Yang Lie Lord, and his body seemed to be far away, but in fact he fell into the time trap, and the time trap was very dangerous, directly annihilating the body of this Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord.

At this time, the other two Transcendental Legendary Lords did not dare to move, and stayed here, observing the surroundings.

Abrupt.

One of the Transcendental Legendary Lords was unable to move, as if frozen in time, and was quickly annihilated.

At this time, Ye Tian and the other Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord could see that the time trap here appeared randomly, and for the intruder, even if he didn't move, he would be targeted by the time trap.

Suddenly.

When the crisis came, Ye Tian moved away directly.

It turned out that there was a time trap where he was standing, but he dodged it in time.

"I'm about to take control of time, and the moment the time trap hits, I can sense it in time and avoid it. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he is not afraid of the time trap here.

It is estimated that the Yang Lie Lord did not expect that the Legendary Lord under the half-step Legendary Realm Lord would still have someone who was about to control time, so the time trap laid out was equivalent to being cracked.

Wow!

Ye Tian rushed to the palace in the distance, and once a time trap came, he directly dodged it.

At this time, the Transcendental Realm Lord thought that Ye Tian was lucky, and he also rushed to the palace in the distance.

However, he had only traveled some distance when the time trap struck.

"Why is he okay, and I have an accident as soon as I move?"

The Transcendental Legendary Lord thought to himself before this clone was annihilated.

He felt that it was so unfair, and the time trap was aimed at him.

Soon.

Ye Tian passed through this time trap area and came to a huge palace.

In front of the palace.

There was a tombstone with words inscribed on it, from the words of the Yang Lie Lord.

"Latecomers, if you pass through here, prove that your strength is incomparably evil at the level of the Transcendental Realm Lord, I know that you latecomers are for treasures. The treasure you want is in that cyan palace, after obtaining the treasure, please leave here."

After Ye Tian finished reading it, he didn't think that Lord Yang Lie was lying.

Therefore, he will not enter the main tomb palace in front of him.

He made his way to the cyan palace next to him, and if the Time River Pearl was in this cemetery, it was probably inside.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled over, and soon entered the cyan palace. _
